items.title: BCNC STEP into Healthcare Program
items.description: The STEP into Healthcare (Skills Training for Entry-level Positions in Healthcare) Program is a free training for intermediate-advanced English language learners seeking full-time entry-level employment in the healthcare industry. The training includes skills for communication at work, computer and phone skills, job search and interview practice, one-on-one help with a career counselor, and OHSA-10 training and cert...

items.title: FREE OSHA Construction Training for Boston Residents
items.description: A free 10-hour safety training course for entry-level construction workers. You will get an OSHA 10 card and a certificate when you finish. **Who can join?:** Only Boston residents can take this class. You must attend both days to get your card. ** When and Where?** - Dates: Monday, June 15 and Tuesday, June 16, 2026. - Time: 9:00 a.m. to 3:00 p.m. both days. - Location: UNITE HERE Local 26 Office (52 Church Street,...

items.title: YMCA Career Advancement Class
items.description: A free 30-week course to help immigrants prepare for college or find a better job.**When**: September to June. ** How it works:** - *First Semester (Sept–Dec)*: Focuses on getting ready for college (applications, financial aid, and academic vocabulary). - *Second Semester (Jan–May):*Focuses on building a career (finding job openings, writing resumes, and practicing interview skills). **Training location:** 100 Frank...

items.title: Biotech and Good Manufacturing Certificate
items.description: A training program to help you start a career in the biotech field. How it works: - Part 1: A 21-week online class with JVS. - Part 2: A 10-month hands-on program at Quincy College. Sign-up for an information session: https://www.jvs-boston.org/our-services/biotech-with-jvs/biotech/ Questions: Call JVS at 617-399-3131.

items.title: EBSC Annual Community Baby Shower
items.titleEs: Baby Shower Comunitario Anual de EBSC
items.description: Pregnant women or mothers of babies born after January 1, 2026 (East Boston residents only). - **When:** Saturday, June 6, 2026, from 10:00 AM to 2:00 PM. - ** Where:** Hilton Garden Inn, 100 Boardman St., Boston, MA 02128. - Tips and tricks about child development. - Information from local support agencies. - Complimentary lunch, games, and prizes. ** Important Note:** Registration is required to attend and receive...
items.summaryEs: Mujeres embarazadas o madres de bebés nacidos después del 1 de enero de 2026 (solo para residentes de East Boston). - **Cuándo:** Sábado 6 de junio de 2026, de 10:00 AM a 2:00 PM. - ** Dónde:** Hilton Garden Inn, 100 Boardman St., Boston, MA 02128. - Consejos y trucos sobre el desarrollo infantil. - Información sobre los servicios de agencias de apoyo locales. - Almuerzo de cortesía, juegos y premios. ** Nota import...

items.title: Citizenship Exam Prep Online Class Summer 2026
items.description: The Citizenship exam preparation class is a 10-week course to prepare students to take the Citizenship exam. Offering instruction to improve English and to learn all 128 questions of the civics portion of the test. Taught by experienced and trained teachers. Individual tutoring is available in each class to review lesson materials. ++**Eligibility requirements:**++ - Applied for citizenship after Oct 20, 2025 - Have...

items.title: Free Immigration Consultation
items.description: The Mayor’s Office for Immigrant Advancement offers free, one-time legal advice by phone. **When: **1st and 3rd Wednesdays of every month (12:00 p.m. – 3:00 p.m.). **Important: **You must register in advance. This is for advice only, not long-term representation. Interpretation is available. **How to Register: **Call ++617-635-2980++, email immigrantadvancement@boston.gov, or fill out the online contact form.
items.summaryEs: La Oficina del Alcalde para el Avance de los Inmigrantes ofrece asesoría legal gratuita y de una sola vez por teléfono. **Cuándo: **El 1er y 3er miércoles de cada mes (12:00 p.m. – 3:00 p.m.). **Importante:** Debe registrarse con anticipación. Es solo para asesoría, no para representación legal a largo plazo. Hay intérpretes disponibles. **Cómo Registrarse:** Llame al ++617-635-2980++, escriba a immigrantadvancement...

items.title: Early Childhood Educator Scholarship
items.description: Join us to learn more about the Early Childhood Educator Scholarship. The session will be on ZOOM and will go over eligibility, how to apply and conclude with a Q&A. Simultaneous interpretation will be provided in Spanish and Portuguese. INTENDED AUDIENCE: Those seeking financial aid to continue their education. Early Childhood Educator Scholarship The Early Childhood Educator Scholarship is financial assistance tow...

items.title: Community Health Workers Training Program
items.description: The Community Health Workers (CHW) Training Program is a year-long opportunity to explore a career in behavioral healthcare. Funded by HRSA's Behavioral Health Workforce Education and Training (BHWET) Program for Paraprofessionals, this training opportunity is fully funded and there is no cost associated with it for participants.

items.title: City of Boston’s Apprenticeship Fair on Apr 28
items.description: In honor of National Apprenticeship Week (April 26 - May 2, 2026), the City of Boston is hosting its 4th Annual Apprenticeship Fair on Tuesday, April 28, 3:30-6 p.m. at the Bruce C. Bolling Municipal Building. This event is part of a nationwide celebration to showcase the successes and value of Registered Apprenticeships for strengthening the economy. Apprenticeships are critical to developing a highly skilled workf...

items.description: African Bridge Network (ABN is now accepting applications for its 2026 Immigrant Professionals Fellowship (africanbn.org/fellowship). Please share this opportunity with your program participants and networks. Upcoming information sessions will provide an opportunity to learn more about the fellowship and the program. Students from several ALI programs have previously participated in this fellowship, and it has been...

items.title: STEP into Health Care Program
items.description: Our FREE training includes: • Learn about jobs in a hospital • Learn English for work • Practice using a computer • Get help finding a job • Get help with your resume and job applications • Practice for job interviews

items.title: ENGLISH FOR EARLY CHILDHOOD EDUCATION
items.description: Description • March 9, 2026 - June 18, 2026 • Three days per week of in-person, contextualized English classes. • Opportunity to take a free, three-credit college-level course. • Six weeks hands-on field experience in early childhood education settings.

items.title: Learn English and Culinary Arts for FREE
items.description: PROGRAM DETAILS • 12 weeks of hands-on cooking with intensive ESOL instruction • Become ServSafe certified • Classes taught by a professional chef and a certified ESOL teacher • Job search support • 12 seats available • Monday to Friday 9:00am-1:00pm

items.description: ABCD's food delivery program provides $130 worth of healthy and fresh produce, meats, and other essential goods to people who qualify on a monthly schedule. The program is for people 55+, disabled and living in a house of 1-2.

items.description: Free OSHA training in English, Spanish, Portuguese, and Haitian Creole. The upcoming Portuguese session will take place on February 3rd-4th from 12-6PM at the East Boston Library located at 365 Bremen Street, Boston, MA 02128.). items.title: Career in the Food Service Industry
items.description: The Teaching Kitchen at Community Servings is a free, 12-week program that helps individuals overcome employment barriers and transition into foodservice careers. Open to career changers and aspiring chefs, it offers hands-on training in a high-volume commercial kitchen and a modern culinary classroom. Trainees gain hands-on experience by preparing thousands of scratch-made, medically tailored meals for Community Se...

items.title: Career in the Life Sciences
items.description: The life sciences industry is dedicated to studying living organisms and applying that knowledge to develop solutions that address global health challenges, improve productivity, and enhance quality of life. This dynamic sector spans various fields, driving innovation in healthcare, agriculture, and environmental solutions. Check out their virtual events to learn more about career paths and training. items.title: CNA Training for English Language Learners
items.description: Cambridge Community Learning Center (CCLC) offers FREE Certified Nursing Assistant (CNA) training programs for intermediate and high level ESOL learners. Sessions run each year from February to June and September to January. This program is available to residents of the following towns: Arlington, Belmont, Burlington, Cambridge, Chelsea, Everett, Malden, Medford, Melrose, North Reading, Reading, Revere, Somerville,...

FREE Business Program
items.description: Are you an entrepreneur in Massachusetts looking for culturally relevant support? ALX invites you to join the ALX Business Program! Our program is free, fully customized to your needs, and available in English or Spanish.

items.description: Free training to eligible Boston residents as Emergency Medical Technicians.

items.title: Work Ready English (WRE) Program
items.description: Work Ready English (WRE) is a free 12-week program that combines English language instruction with job placement assistance to help you succeed in the workplace. This program is designed for students who hold a U.S. Passport or a Permanent Resident Card (Green Card) and have work authorization in the US, ensuring stable employment opportunities. With WRE, you’ll gain the language skills and employment support you ne...

items.description: Are you ready to launch or grow your career in health and human services? Come join us at the Health & Human Services Career Expo hosted by MassHire Downtown Boston in partnership with Roxbury Community College and the Commonwealth of Massachusetts Executive Office of Health & Human Services! This event will include: Meeting hiring managers in person Learn about a variety of opportunities Free prep resources Interes...

Through 200+ hours of free Career Readiness and Occupational Skills Training, with classroom and hands-on learning experiences, Building Pathways will provide you with the knowledge and skills you need to enter and succeed in a r...

items.description: Would you like to work in a lab as part of a clinical laboratory team? Interested in withdrawing blood? This training might be for you!!

items.title: World Education Services (WES)
items.description: Get your foreign diploma or transcripts evaluated for U.S. college, work, or licensing. WES is a widely accepted credential evaluation service used by schools, employers, and immigration offices. Apply online and send required documents from your school.
items.summaryEs: Obtenga una evaluación de su diploma o notas de otro país para college, trabajo o licencias en EE.UU. WES es un servicio de evaluación de credenciales aceptado por escuelas, empleadores y oficinas de inmigración. Solicite en línea y envíe los documentos que pida su escuela.

items.title: Roxbury Community College
items.description: Go to college to earn a degree or a short certificate. They offer associate degrees and certificates in health, business, technology, and more. Financial aid and academic advising are available. The campus is across from the Roxbury Crossing T stop.
items.summaryEs: Vaya al college para obtener un título o un certificado corto. Ofrecen títulos asociados y certificados en salud, negocios, tecnología y más. Hay ayuda financiera y asesoramiento académico. El campus está frente a la estación Roxbury Crossing del T.
items.highlights: Go to college, Apply to college, Get training

items.title: Permission to Share Your Case Info (ICE/DHS)
items.titleEs: Permiso para compartir su información de caso (ICE/DHS)
items.description: Sign form so family or a lawyer can get your immigration info from the government.
items.summaryEs: Firme para que un familiar o abogado pueda obtener su información de inmigración.
items.titleEn: Permission to Share Your Case Info (ICE/DHS)
items.resourceTitleEs: Permiso para compartir su información de caso (ICE/DHS)
items.highlights: Let someone get your info if detained

items.title: Massachusetts HiSET
items.description: Create an account to register for the Massachusetts HiSET exam, pick a test center and date, reschedule if needed, and check scores.
items.highlights: Sign up for HiSET, Schedule HSE test

items.title: 988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline
items.description: Call or text 988 anytime for free, private support if you are feeling sad, stressed, or in crisis
items.summaryEs: Llame o envíe un texto al 988 en cualquier momento para apoyo confidencial y gratuito si se siente triste, estresado o en crisis.
items.highlights: Call crisis support, Get crisis support, Get mental health support

items.title: Mayor’s Health Line
items.description: Call for free help in many languages to sign up for health insurance or find a doctor near you
items.summaryEs: Llame para recibir ayuda gratuita en muchos idiomas para inscribirse en un seguro de salud o buscar un médico cercano.
items.highlights: Get insurance help, Find a clinic, Get health care

items.title: Health Care For All Massachusetts
items.description: Call the free hotline to get help signing up for health insurance. They help you keep your MassHealth coverage
items.summaryEs: Llame a la línea de ayuda gratuita para recibir ayuda al inscribirse en un seguro de salud. Le ayudan a mantener su cobertura de MassHealth.
items.highlights: Get insurance help, Find a clinic, Get health care, Learn your rights

items.title: NeighborHealth (formerly East Boston Neighborhood Health Center)
items.titleEs: NeighborHealth (formerly East Boston Neighborhood Health Center)
items.description: Go to the doctor, dentist, or eye doctor. They treat all patients regardless of insurance or immigration status
items.summaryEs: Vaya al médico, dentista u oftalmólogo. Atienden a todos los pacientes sin importar su seguro o estado migratorio.
items.titleEn: NeighborHealth (formerly East Boston Neighborhood Health Center)
items.resourceTitleEs: NeighborHealth (formerly East Boston Neighborhood Health Center)
items.highlights: Get health care, Get dental care, Get mental health support, Get insurance help

items.title: Community Healing Response Network
items.description: Get free, private support if you or your family have been hurt by community violence
items.summaryEs: Reciba apoyo privado y gratuito si usted o su familia han sufrido por la violencia comunitaria.
items.highlights: Get trauma support, Get crisis support, Get mental health support, Get safety support

items.title: East Boston Head Start
items.description: Get free preschool and childcare for children ages 3 to 5. They also provide free meals and family support
items.summaryEs: Consiga preescolar y cuidado infantil gratis para niños de 3 a 5 años. También ofrecen comidas gratuitas y apoyo familiar.
items.highlights: Find preschool, Find childcare, Get parent support, Get family support

items.title: Center for Educational Documentation
items.description: Get your school diploma or transcripts from another country evaluated for work or college. They also translate school documents
items.summaryEs: Obtenga una evaluación de su diploma escolar o notas de otro país para trabajar o ir al college. También traducen documentos escolares.

items.description: Go to college to earn a degree or a certificate. They offer English support, financial aid, and career advisors
items.summaryEs: Vaya al college para obtener un título o un certificado. Ofrecen apoyo en inglés, ayuda financiera y asesores de carrera.
items.highlights: Go to college, Apply to college, Get training, Get job training

items.title: JVS Boston
items.description: Get help with job training, career coaching, and English classes. They help you find a job, especially in healthcare
items.summaryEs: Reciba ayuda con capacitación laboral, asesoramiento de carrera y clases de inglés. Le ayudan a buscar trabajo, especialmente en el área de salud.
items.highlights: Get job training, Find a job program, Take English classes, Get career help, Practice job skills

items.title: BEST Hospitality Training
items.description: Take free training for hotel and restaurant jobs. They help you get union jobs and practice your work skills
items.summaryEs: Tome capacitación gratuita para trabajos en hoteles y restaurantes. Le ayudan a conseguir trabajos del sindicato y practicar sus habilidades de trabajo.
items.address: 101 Station Landing, Fourth Floor, Medford, MA 02155
items.highlights: Get job training, Get career help, Practice job skills

items.description: Take job training courses and English classes. They also help you with career coaching and finding a job
items.summaryEs: Tome cursos de capacitación laboral y clases de inglés. También le ofrecen asesoramiento de carrera y ayuda para buscar trabajo.
items.highlights: Get job training, Take English classes, Get career help, Get community help

items.title: Maverick Landing Community Services
items.description: Get free groceries, English classes, and job training. They also offer youth programs and help with housing
items.summaryEs: Consiga comestibles, clases de inglés y capacitación laboral gratis. También ofrecen programas para jóvenes y ayuda con la vivienda.
items.highlights: Get groceries, Get community help, Take English classes, Find youth programs, Get job training
